name: SeekingChartis / RCM-MC
description: Private, password-gated healthcare PE diligence workbench. Backed by the 15,327-LOC stdlib HTTP server in rcm_mc/server.py; Heroku adapter in web/. No WSGI framework, no Redis, no Postgres — single dyno + SQLite.

PYTHONUNBUFFERED.description: Flush stdout/stderr so `heroku logs --tail` keeps up with the server in real time.

PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE.description: Skip .pyc file writes — the dyno filesystem is ephemeral and we want predictable startup.

ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Login username for the first admin user (created during release phase).

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Admin password, 8+ characters. Bootstrap is idempotent — safe to re-run on redeploy. Rotate via `heroku config:set ADMIN_PASSWORD=...` + new admin UI flow after first login.

RCM_MC_DB.description: SQLite path. Heroku's filesystem is ephemeral (wiped on every dyno cycle). /tmp works for MVP; for persistence, wire a nightly backup job to S3 via rcm_mc.infra.backup.

RCM_MC_PHI_MODE.description: PHI posture banner driver. 'disallowed' = public-data-only deployment (shows a commitment banner on every page). 'restricted' = PHI flows allowed under BAA (Heroku Standard is NOT BAA-compliant — do not set to 'restricted' here). Leave 'disallowed' for standard Heroku deployments.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional. Enables LLM-assisted features in rcm_mc/ai/. Safe to omit — features degrade to template fallbacks.
